reset_request.title: Password recovery
reset_request.description: If an account with this email exists, we'll send a password reset code.

reset_confirm.title: Reset password
reset_confirm.description: Enter the code from the email and set a new password.

register.title: Sign up
register.country_help: Select a country from the list. This field is filled in once at registration.
register.timezone_help: The time zone affects the displayed time in CoTel bot notifications (subscriptions feature).
register.terms_text: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and the Terms of Service, and I confirm that I am at least 16 years old.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.description: We've sent a verification code to your email. Enter it below.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Here you can submit a feedback request, report a bug, or suggest a feature improvement.
feedback.message_placeholder: Describe the issue or suggestion in more detail
feedback.attach_hint: Up to 5 files, max 5 MB each.
feedback.too_many_files: You can attach up to 5 files.
feedback.file_too_large: File “{{name}}” exceeds the maximum size (5 MB).
feedback.send_failed: Could not send the request. Please try again later.
feedback.send_success: Thank you! Your request has been sent. We will get back to you by email.

limits.frequency_per_minutes: no more than once every {{value}} min
limits.frequency_per_hour_one: no more than once per hour
limits.frequency_per_hours_other: no more than once every {{value}} h

personal.phone_help: Optional. Used for convenient Telegram login.
personal.timezone_help: The time zone affects the displayed time in CoTel notifications and subscription run intervals.

settings.default_ai_model_help: Used by default for analyzing queries and new subscriptions. Free tier uses OpenAI.
settings.ultra_secure_help: When you sign out of CoTel, the service will also end the active Telegram session linked to your account.

change_password.title: Change password
change_password.description: Enter your current password and set a new one.

delete_account.title: Delete profile
delete_account.description: This action cannot be undone. Your sessions, Telegram session, chat history, subscriptions, and profile working data will be deleted.

cookie_banner.title: We use cookies 🍪
cookie_banner.text: By continuing to use this site, you agree to the use of cookies for authentication and proper service operation.

messages.register_password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

messages.register_terms_required: To continue, please confirm that you agree to the Privacy Policy and the Terms of Service.
messages.register_failed: Could not create account. Please try again later.

messages.reset_already_used: This code has already been used.
messages.reset_too_many_attempts: Too many invalid attempts. Please request a new code.
messages.change_password_same_as_current: New password must be different from the current one.
messages.change_password_not_available: Password change is not available for this account.
messages.delete_not_available: Password-based deletion is not available for this account.
messages.profile_phone_in_use: This phone number is already used by another account.
messages.login_too_many: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
messages.login_needs_verify: Please verify your email first. We've sent a new code.
messages.reset_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
messages.reset_request_sent: If an account exists, we've sent a reset code.
messages.reset_request_failed: Could not send code. Please try again later.
messages.reset_code_required: Please enter the code from the email.
messages.reset_password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
messages.reset_success: Password changed. You can sign in with the new password.
messages.reset_failed: Could not reset password. Please try again later.
messages.resend_sent: A new code has been sent to your email.
messages.resend_failed: Could not resend the code. Please try again later.
messages.profile_save_failed: Could not save profile. Please try again later.
messages.profile_phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
messages.profile_timezone_invalid: Please select a valid time zone.
messages.change_password_new_short: New password must be at least 8 characters.
messages.change_password_failed: Could not change password. Please try again later.
messages.delete_failed: Could not delete profile. Please try again later.
